screening_answers.why_this_company: I'm drawn to [Company] because of [specific product or mission]. My background in [relevant skill] directly maps to what your team is building, and I want to work somewhere where the engineering quality actually matters.
screening_answers.why_this_role: This role matches where I want to grow — specifically around [skill from JD]. I've been doing [adjacent thing] for [X years] and this is the natural next step.
screening_answers.biggest_strength: I take ambiguous requirements and turn them into working, testable systems quickly. I ask the right clarifying questions upfront so the team doesn't waste cycles.
screening_answers.biggest_weakness: I used to hold code reviews until everything was perfect. Now I ship smaller PRs faster and get feedback earlier — it's made me a better collaborator.
screening_answers.where_in_5_years: Leading a small, high-output engineering team on a product I'm genuinely proud of. I want technical depth and some people leadership.
screening_answers.salary_expectation: I'm targeting $120,000–$140,000 based on my 5 years of experience and current market rates for this type of role in [location/remote].
